mapper.sql: CAST(a.id AS CHAR) AS "id", a.id AS "longId", a.button_key AS "buttonKey", a.button_name AS "buttonName", a.button_status AS "buttonStatus", a.create_time AS "createTime", a.update_time AS "updateTime", a.create_by AS "createById", a.update_by AS "updateById", a.is_deleted AS "isDeleted"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_button_config a
WHERE a.id = CAST(#{id} AS UNSIGNED) AND a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_button_config( button_key, button_name, button_status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{buttonKey}, #{buttonName}, #{buttonStatus}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createById}, #{updateById}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_button_config SET button_key = #{buttonKey}, button_name = #{buttonName}, button_status = #{buttonStatus}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateById} WHERE id = #{longId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_button_config SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_button_config a
WHERE a.${propertyName} = #{value} AND a.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM t_button_config a WHERE a.button_key = #{buttonKey} AND a.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_button_config WHERE id IN
CAST(#{id} AS UNSIGNED)
